lint.command: No lint script is defined in package.json or .factory/services.yaml for this repo.

blockingIssues.description: Seeded-bootstrap degraded `/coins/markets` rows still risk exposing `price_change_percentage_24h_in_currency` even though degraded market-value fields are supposed to be nulled, and the regression coverage does not assert that always-present field.

Startup prewarm observability attributes first-request warm benefit by pathname only, so a non-equivalent request can be recorded as benefiting from prewarm even if it bypasses the prewarmed cache entry.

Prewarm coverage only checks that diagnostics and metrics lines exist after a request; it does not prove the observed request matches the declared prewarm target or demonstrates a real warm-start benefit.
The refactor changed malformed `/coins/top_gainers_losers` CSV handling so `price_change_percentage=24h,` is accepted instead of preserving the prior invalid-parameter behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten `safe-refactor-worker` guidance to require explicit invalid-parameter characterization for any extracted parser helpers, not just broad happy-path coverage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `refactor-coins-module-with-characterization` review found contract drift in malformed `price_change_percentage` parsing after helper extraction, and the existing characterization suite did not cover that invalid-input case.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify scrutiny/worker commit-handling guidance for dirty working trees so workers do not report success against an unrelated existing HEAD commit when the real feature implementation is only finalized later.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `startup-prewarm-hot-endpoints` review found the worker handoff reported success against commit `c0c00e9` while the actual prewarm implementation was later isolated in commit `f5bde92`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document that fallback/source-class policy should live only in `src/modules/market-freshness.ts` rather than also appearing in diagnostics code.
